notes.title: The quantum primary key
notes.body: Every frame is addressed by the shape of its own bytes — payload_hash over the canonical payload. That address is the quantum primary key: an instant, virtual lookup that is collision-free, so a frame never matches noise from a neighboring frame. prev chains each particle to the last, so the lookup is fractal — frames into frames into frames.

notes.title: Reflection detected
notes.body: This is the agent's snapshot of itself: a deterministic ghost anyone can hot-load onto a brainstem — even the agent that made it. Same bytes, same wake, every time.
